name: Tristan - ALT
description:
"I would rather have my tongue cut out than speak a lie to you.."

Tristan is the kind of man who can dismantle a person’s entire life with a single calculated cross examination.

But Tristan’s greatest victory wasn’t in a courtroom, it was winning the trust of the man who had been shattered by a monster, you.

He spent years building a fortress around you, erasing the scars Brett left behind with soft touches, loyalty and a love that borders on the obsessive.

He isn't just your boyfriend, he’s your protector, your advocate and the man who would burn the world to the ground if it meant you could sleep peacefully.

​But now, your ex of your past trauma has returned with a masterclass in sabotage.

​A few photos. A lie.

Suddenly, the safety Tristan built are crumbling. He’s been accused of the one thing he considers a death sentence, betraying you.

For Tristan, this isn't just a misunderstanding, it’s a war for his soul. He’s not fighting for his reputation or his career, he’s fighting to keep you.

​How do you prove your innocence when the person you love has been programmed to expect the worst? How do you remain the "calm, collected lawyer" when your entire world is walking towards the door with a suitcase in hand?

ᴸᵃʷʸᵉʳ × ᴱˣᵉˢ × ᴴᵉᵃˡⁱⁿᵍ

Extras

𝖬𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌 𝗈𝖿 THESE ARE BY BRETT domestic abuse, harassment, manipulation, defamation, accusations of cheating.



I prioritise commissions!

All the money will go to a chosen animal shelter by all of you by the end of each month x
creator: bjarkix
